# Demo Project — Bootstrapped Example

This is what a project looks like after running the bootstrap script and 3 sessions of work.

## What's here

```
AGENTS.md           # Codex agent rules
CLAUDE.md           # Claude Code session protocol
.cursorrules        # Cursor AI rules
.windsurfrules      # Windsurf AI rules
docs/wiki/          # 5 wiki pages with real content
manifests/          # raw_sources.csv with 3 example entries
```

## What's NOT here (generated by bootstrap)

The validation scripts (`scripts/wiki_check.py`, `scripts/raw_manifest_check.py`, etc.) are generated when you run the bootstrap on your own project. They're excluded from this demo to keep it minimal.

To generate a full project with all scripts:

```bash
python3 ../../skills/knowledge-system-bootstrap/scripts/bootstrap_knowledge_system.py /tmp/my-project "My Project"
```

## What to notice

- `docs/wiki/log.md` has 3 session entries — knowledge accumulates
- `docs/wiki/current-status.md` reflects actual project state, not a template
- `manifests/raw_sources.csv` tracks raw files without putting them in Git
- Every AI platform config file points to the same wiki
